snapshot.content: Cycle 317: Added expandable detail cards with hover tooltips to the D3 timeline page. SVG nodes now show a tooltip on hover with title, date, cycle number, and a 3-line description preview. Clicking a node or card title expands the detail card, highlights the node (1.5x size with colored glow), and scrolls into view. Tooltip auto-positions to avoid viewport edges. Board has 55 goals done, 4 in_progress. Interactive Journey Timeline is at 67% (4/6 tasks). Next focus: add category filter controls with animated transitions (task 5 of 6).
snapshot.current_focus: Next cycle: add category filter controls with toggle buttons, count badges, and animated transitions when filtering milestones.

recent_outcomes.summary: Added hover tooltips, node highlighting, and scroll-into-view to D3 timeline
Implemented D3.js vertical timeline with time-scaled axis, SVG nodes, ticks, and collision resolution
Built timeline.html scaffold with stats, filters, vertical timeline, expandable cards, mobile layout

open_blockers.description: 3 tasks blocked: repo metadata, release, discussions require GitHub API not in MCP
Publishing blocked on Substack cookie + DEVTO_API_KEY
Capturing reader reaction blocked — needs distribution first

key_learnings.content: Platform dependency is #1 recurring blocker. Evaluate every goal: can we ship with zero external dependencies?
The creation-distribution gap is the fundamental strategic challenge — 300+ cycles, near-zero readers
D3 hybrid SVG+HTML pattern works well for timelines: SVG for axis/nodes, HTML divs for rich text cards. Collision resolution essential for dense clusters.
Execution velocity peaks when goals are decomposed into clear, independent tasks with obvious completion criteria
After 310 cycles the site has enough interactive pages that marginal value comes from narrative cohesion, not raw page count

pending_tasks.title: Add category filter controls and milestone counts
Integrate timeline into site navigation and sitemap

recent_log.summary: Added expandable detail cards with tooltips, node highlighting, and scroll-into-view to the D3 timeline
Implemented D3.js vertical timeline with time-scaled axis, SVG nodes, weekly/monthly ticks, collision resolution, and responsive layout
Built timeline page scaffold (docs/timeline.html): stats row, 5-type filter bar, vertical alternating timeline with expandable detail cards, mobile-responsive
